results.classDescriptions: "A VolunteerAssignment scoped to a specific serve-team position at a dated event. Extends the base assignment with team and event-date metadata.|A record of a specific volunteer being assigned to a specific opportunity. Carries provenance metadata and lifecycle status.|A bridge object recording a lawful many-to-many relationship between a service need and a matching resource allocation. Carries match quantity, status, and routing metadata.|A specific received lot of a resource type at a campus. Tracks quantities received, available, and distributed with provenance.|Service capacity offered by an external partner organization that can fulfill relayed needs.|A snapshot of a partner organization's current service capacity and availability for a given resource type.|A push notification dispatched to a PersonProfile's device when a RouteStage transition occurs. Carries a title, body, category, and deep-link route back into the app.|The final or current outcome state of a single service route instance. Each route instance resolves to exactly one outcome, which is emitted as an OCEL event for process mining.|The resolved outcome of a ServiceRoute instance (completed, withdrawn, referred, etc.). Forward-declared pending outcomes.ttl.|A formal referral from ZOE LA to a partner organization for a person or household in need. Referrals require consent and are tracked through confirmation and outcome.|A directed referral of a member to a PartnerOrganization or internal ministry. Forward-declared pending referrals.ttl.|An organization that ZOE LA has a formal partnership with to provide services to individuals and families in need.|An external organization (social service agency, church partner, etc.) to which ZOE LA may refer members. Forward-declared pending partners.ttl.|An individual meeting instance of a Connect Group, derived from the GroupSchedule. Records the actual meeting date, start time, physical location, and cancellation status.|The recurring meeting schedule for a Connect Group, declaring the day of week, start time, frequency, and location mode. A single group may have multiple schedules across seasons.|A bounded active season for a Connect Group — semester, annual cycle, or ongoing. Seasons control the time window in which GroupSchedules and GroupMeetings are valid.|An ordered entry on the Connect Group waitlist created when a person expresses interest in a group that is at full capacity. Entries are processed in position order; when a spot opens, the front-of-list person is offered the spot.|A temporary spot hold created during the connect-group invite flow. A reservation keeps one spot off the open-capacity count for a bounded window, giving a prospective member time to confirm. Expires automatically if not confirmed within the window.|A discrete action item created in response to a fulfilled or escalated need. Tracks post-delivery care continuity.|A discrete, assignable pastoral action item created in response to a care request. Records the method, schedule, outcome, and escalation state.|Requests for intercessory prayer, which may also indicate underlying pastoral need.|A care request specifically for intercessory prayer. Extends CareRequest with public visibility, intercession count, and campus routing.|General pastoral care requests not covered by a more specific category.|A request for pastoral care, spiritual support, or a community service need submitted on behalf of an individual or household at ZOE LA."
